rationale: Removed inline derived --beam-inner-inset and --beam-inner-radius assignments so mission-control.css derives them from primary beam radius and width variables.
Changed the data-trail=none conic gradient to use solid --beam-head-color stops from --beam-head-start through --beam-head-end.
Bot review summary only; its actionable points are tracked by the inline comments addressed separately.
Removed inner-radius overrides from the masked beam and glow layers so they inherit the host outer ring radius while padding defines the content-box mask.
Bot review summary/metadata only; the actionable Codex inline comment is addressed separately.
